description.value: Price 41,535 gp; Slot none; CL 6th; Weight 4 lbs.; Aura moderate illusion DESCRIPTION This +2 distance light crossbow shrouds its wielder in shadows, granting her a +4 competence bonus on Stealth checks. Three times per day, the wielder can also become invisible, as per the invisibility spell, for up to 6 minutes. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 20,935 gp; Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells invisibility; Special creator must have 4 ranks in Stealth
